Month | Sales (mil. of €) [S_i] | Labor (hr) [L_i] | Days worked [d_i] | Level workforce (number of employees required) [E_i] | Monthly production (millions of dollars) [mp_i] | Inventory balance (mil. of €) [Ib_i]
Sept | 29.6 | 148000 | 21 | 684 | 22.98 | 12.15
Oct | 24.8 | 124000 | 22 | 684 | 24.08 | 11.43
Nov | 32 | 160000 | 20 | 684 | 21.89 | 1.32

options: No, because except for December, for the other months the level of stocks is higher than that of the safety stock.

ability to change the product mix while maintaining the same total production quantity
ease with which design changes can be accommodated and new product can be introduced
capability to produce parts through alternative workstation sequences in response to breakdowns, tool failures, and other interruptions at individual stations
ability to economically produce parts in high and low quantities of production, given the fixed investment in the system
correct_answers: ability to change the product mix while maintaining the same total production quantity
